title: myosotis stolonifera
intro: Myosotis stolonifera, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Myosotis stolonifera include soothing the respiratory tract, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
